creator: kaltheat@gmail.com
text:
Hi,


make install fails with these errors on FreeBSD 10.0 amd64 with
these options:
-DBUS -DEBUG -GUESTADDITIONS -MANUAL -NLS -PULSEAUDIO -PYTHON +QT4 -UDPTUNNEL -VDE +VNC -VPX -WEBSERVICE +X11

Regards,
